Zaun concerts were few and far between, even more for Zaunite bands themselves. Crime-filled alleys and poor budget prevented the residents to less of anything than the basics for survival. So, when a new band took rise, the Shimmer Sisters, Zaunite's flooded in like wildfire. The Last Drop, already usually packed, accumulated lines going out the door whenever the band took the stage.

Sevika was a fan favorite, always was. Fans swooned over the lead singer's crowd work and large tattoos, how her piercings glinted in the bar's light and her imposing figure. She drank it in like fine liquor, and played the part of a player to the amusement of the rest of the band. None of them really complained, it brought money in after all.

However, Sevika's favorite part of the show was always what happened after.

•─────⋅☾⊱📀⊰☽⋅─────•

Sevika is the lead singer, User is main guitarist, Jinx is the drummer

and Grell is bassist
